description: Composition Crown blue polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar and cuffs, buttoned chest placket, vented hem and embroidered brand name appliqued on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash with like colours and warm water Use a non chlorine bleach Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Warm iron, do not iron on decorations Look sporty and sophisticated in this simple crown blue T-shirt from levis. The tee with the ribbed collar gives you a laidback and casual look, the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day, while the ribbed cuffs sit snug on your well toned arms. Pair this tee with chinos and leather slip-ons for a day out at the club. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18"
